dep-fastmcp.name: fastmcp
dep-fastmcp.purpose: MCP runtime, OAuth Proxy integration, tool registration, and HTTP stream transport

dep-zod.name: zod
dep-zod.purpose: Tool input schemas with deterministic validation

dep-pg.name: pg
dep-pg.purpose: Deferred/legacy persistence modules outside current runtime auth path

dep-drizzle.name: drizzle-orm
dep-drizzle.purpose: Deferred/legacy persistence modules outside current runtime auth path

constraint-fastmcp.reason: OAuth Proxy support and route mounting APIs

constraint-zod.reason: Schema ergonomics and deterministic tool contracts

AuthModel.McpAuth: FastMCP OAuth Proxy (Logto OIDC upstream) is required for `/mcp`
AuthModel.IsolationRule: ROOT_AUTH_TOKEN is never valid for `/mcp`; OAuth session is not admin credential

CurrentToolSurface.Policy: Tool allowlist is fixed; unsupported tool names are rejected deterministically

ProductBoundary.InScope: OAuth-protected MCP proxy for existing 4 tools, root-token admin auth, deterministic schema validation
ProductBoundary.OutOfScope: API-key auth for `/mcp`, `search_context`, `validate_google_map_link`, `verify_tabelog`, trip planning/orchestration/memory subsystems

DeferredCapabilities.capability-1: search_context hybrid retrieval with evidence contract
